message:
fix(fr-command): LPOS COUNT non-numeric uses upstream wording [bd-frankenredis-29ct]

Upstream t_list.c::lposCommand parses COUNT via
getPositiveLongFromObjectOrReply with the 'COUNT can't be negative'
error message, so both unparseable integers ("abc") and explicit
negative values share that wording.

fr-command was returning the generic 'value is not an integer or
out of range' for the unparseable case (the explicit-negative
branch already mapped to the right wording).

This mirrors the already-fixed MAXLEN parity (lposmaxlen).
